narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive capital expenditure by hyperscalers and enterprises into AI capabilities is fueling unprecedented demand for advanced AI chips and related hardware.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVDA revenue growth decelerates significantly
China export controls expand to HBM

sources.title: Nvidia can deliver chips — but it can’t buy Big Tech out of its credit and power-grid crisis
Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are increasingly adopting AI-powered software and cloud services, driving growth for companies providing these solutions and underlying infrastructure.
watchFor: Major cloud providers report decelerating revenue growth
Enterprise IT spending surveys show a pullback
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI software platforms

sources.title: Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The rapid adoption and expanding indications for GLP-1 agonists are creating a massive growth opportunity for pharmaceutical companies leading in this space.
watchFor: New competitors enter the market with superior efficacy/safety
Significant payer pushback on reimbursement for GLP-1s
Unexpected long-term side effects emerge

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Strong consumer spending and robust payment volumes continue to drive growth for credit card networks and payment processors.
watchFor: Sharp decline in consumer spending data
Increased regulatory caps on interchange fees
Rise in credit card delinquencies

narratives.name: Semiconductor Equipment Expansion
narratives.thesis: The ongoing expansion of chip manufacturing capacity, driven by AI and other advanced technologies, is creating strong demand for semiconductor equipment and materials.
watchFor: TSM or Samsung announce delays in fab construction
Global chip inventory levels rise unexpectedly
Geopolitical tensions disrupt supply chains for key materials

narratives.name: Discount Stores Stability
narratives.thesis: Consumers are increasingly gravitating towards discount stores and value retailers as inflation erodes purchasing power, providing stability to these businesses.
watchFor: CPI data shows significant disinflation
Consumer sentiment improves dramatically, shifting spending to discretionary
Intensified price wars among retailers

sources.title: People are putting less gas in their tanks as high prices crimp budgets, Walmart says

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Increased global geopolitical tensions and defense budgets are driving demand for aerospace and defense contractors.
watchFor: Significant cuts to defense budgets globally
Major diplomatic breakthroughs reducing global tensions
Supply chain disruptions impacting production

narratives.name: Computer Hardware Demand
narratives.thesis: Demand for high-performance computing hardware, particularly servers and components optimized for AI workloads, remains robust.
watchFor: Corporate IT budget cuts impacting server sales
Supply chain disruptions for key hardware components
Increased competition leading to price compression

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Major internet content and information platforms continue to dominate digital advertising spend and user engagement, benefiting from network effects and data insights.
watchFor: Major advertisers cut spending significantly
New privacy regulations impact ad targeting effectiveness
Emergence of new, disruptive content platforms

narratives.name: Information Technology Services Growth
narratives.thesis: Consulting and integration services related to AI implementation and digital transformation are driving demand for IT services firms.
watchFor: Slowing corporate spending on digital transformation initiatives
Increased pricing pressure in IT consulting
Recessionary fears impacting enterprise project starts

narratives.name: E-commerce Resilience
narratives.thesis: Despite inflationary pressures, online retail continues to show resilience, with consumers prioritizing convenience and selection.
watchFor: Significant decline in online retail sales reports
Increased competition leading to margin compression
Logistics costs rising faster than revenue growth

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Consumption
narratives.thesis: Streaming services and entertainment content providers continue to capture consumer attention, although competition for subscribers remains fierce.
watchFor: Significant subscriber churn reported by major streamers
Increased content production costs impacting profitability
New entrants disrupting the streaming market

sources.title: IMAX has held ‘preliminary talks’ with potential buyers, source says

narratives.name: Healthcare Plans Stability
narratives.thesis: Healthcare plans demonstrate stability driven by consistent demand for services and effective management of medical costs, despite ongoing policy debates.
watchFor: Major shifts in government healthcare policy (e.g., Medicare for All proposals)
Unexpected spikes in medical cost trends
Increased regulatory scrutiny on M&A activity

narratives.name: Logistics Operational Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising fuel costs and potential softening in consumer demand are creating operational headwinds for integrated freight and logistics companies.
watchFor: Crude oil prices decline significantly
Global trade volumes show unexpected rebound
Successful implementation of cost-cutting measures by logistics firms

sources.title: People are putting less gas in their tanks as high prices crimp budgets, Walmart says

narratives.name: Apparel Retail Headwinds
narratives.thesis: High inflation and reduced discretionary spending are creating headwinds for apparel retailers as consumers cut back on non-essential purchases.
watchFor: Stronger-than-expected earnings from apparel companies
CPI data shows significant deceleration in apparel prices
Consumer sentiment rebounds sharply

sources.title: People are putting less gas in their tanks as high prices crimp budgets, Walmart says

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified AI Adoption
narratives.thesis: Diversified banks are investing in AI and digital transformation to improve efficiency and customer experience, but face headwinds from interest rate volatility and potential credit quality concerns.
watchFor: Significant deterioration in loan portfolios
Unexpected Fed rate hikes or cuts impacting net interest margin
Increased regulatory fines or enforcement actions

sources.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank

narratives.name: Utilities - Independent Power Producers Growth
narratives.thesis: Demand for reliable power generation continues to support independent power producers, especially those with diversified portfolios.
watchFor: Significant drop in energy prices
Increased regulatory pressure on power generation
Major shifts in industrial power demand

narratives.name: Medical Devices Under Pressure
narratives.thesis: The medical device sector faces pressure from hospital budget constraints, supply chain issues, and increased regulatory hurdles.
watchFor: Hospitals report easing budget pressures
Supply chain issues for medical components resolve
Faster-than-expected FDA approvals for new devices

narratives.name: Residential Construction Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Rising interest rates and high material costs are creating uncertainty for the residential construction sector, with potential for slowing demand.
watchFor: Mortgage rates decline significantly
Housing starts data shows unexpected strength
Material costs stabilize or decrease

narratives.name: Farm & Heavy Construction Machinery Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The sector faces uncertainty due to fluctuating commodity prices and global economic growth prospects, impacting demand for heavy machinery.
watchFor: Strong rebound in agricultural commodity prices
Increased government infrastructure spending
Significant slowdown in global industrial production

narratives.name: Asset Management Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Asset managers face a mixed environment with potential for increased AUM from market gains but also pressure on fees and competition.
watchFor: Significant market downturn impacting AUM
Increased regulatory scrutiny on fee structures
Shift in investor preference away from active management

narratives.name: Household & Personal Products Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Demand for essential household and personal products remains steady, but companies face challenges from rising input costs and potential for trade-downs by consumers.
watchFor: Significant decline in raw material costs
Strong pricing power demonstrated by key players
Increased competition from private labels

narratives.name: Utilities - Renewable Watchlist
narratives.thesis: The long-term shift towards renewable energy continues, but near-term growth can be impacted by interest rates, supply chain issues, and policy uncertainty.
watchFor: Significant changes in government renewable energy incentives
Breakthroughs in energy storage technology
Rising interest rates making project financing more expensive

narratives.name: Other Industrial Metals & Mining Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Demand for various industrial metals is tied to global manufacturing and construction activity, facing potential volatility from economic cycles.
watchFor: Strong rebound in global manufacturing PMIs
New infrastructure spending initiatives
Increased trade tensions impacting commodity flows

narratives.name: Software Infrastructure Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Software Infrastructure on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Internet Retail on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Restaurants Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Restaurants on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Auto Manufacturers Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Auto Manufacturers on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Consumer Health Products Watchlist

narratives.name: Gold Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Gold on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Silver on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

Technology.thesis: The AI infrastructure buildout continues to drive strong demand for semiconductors and related equipment, with major tech players investing heavily. However, rising bond yields pose a potential headwind for valuation multiples.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
10Y yield breaks above 5% — kills the duration bid that powers software multiples
Significant slowdown in enterprise software spending reported by major vendors

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer spending remains resilient in some areas like e-commerce, but high inflation and rising gas prices are starting to crimp budgets for discretionary items, particularly impacting apparel and home-related retail.
watchFor: Retail sales data shows significant contraction
Unemployment rate rises above 4.5%
Consumer confidence index drops sharply

Communication Services.thesis: While digital advertising and content platforms continue to see engagement, the sector faces challenges from rising costs and potential shifts in consumer spending habits due to inflation.
watchFor: Significant decline in digital ad spending reports
Subscription cancellations accelerate for streaming services
New regulatory actions targeting social media platforms

Industrials.thesis: Aerospace & Defense continues to benefit from geopolitical tensions, while integrated freight and logistics face operational headwinds from higher fuel costs and potential slowing demand.
watchFor: De-escalation of major geopolitical conflicts
Significant drop in global trade volumes
Sharp decline in commodity prices

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 obesity drug wave continues to drive significant interest and investment, but other areas of healthcare, like medical devices, face scrutiny and potential pricing pressures.
watchFor: Unexpected negative trial results for GLP-1 drugs
Increased regulatory pressure on drug pricing
Major changes in healthcare policy or reimbursement

Financials.thesis: Credit Services remain robust due to healthy consumer spending, but diversified banks face a challenging interest rate environment and potential tightening credit conditions.
watchFor: Significant increase in loan defaults across consumer and corporate segments
Fed signals aggressive rate cuts, compressing NIM
Major regulatory changes impacting bank profitability

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Discount stores and essential goods providers are benefiting from consumers seeking value amidst inflationary pressures, demonstrating resilience.
watchFor: Significant deceleration in inflation, reducing demand for value
Unexpected surge in unemployment impacting broad consumer spending
Increased competition from online retailers

Utilities.thesis: Independent power producers and renewable energy companies are seeing growth, but the sector as a whole is sensitive to interest rate changes and regulatory environments.
watchFor: Sharp increase in interest rates impacting financing costs
Major changes in energy policy or subsidies
Unexpected disruptions to energy supply or demand

Basic Materials.thesis: Industrial metals and mining face a mixed outlook, influenced by global economic growth, supply chain dynamics, and specific demand drivers.
watchFor: Significant slowdown in global industrial production
Major disruptions to mining operations or supply chains
Unexpected shifts in demand from key end-use sectors

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are currently influenced by a hawkish Fed narrative due to persistent inflation, but also by ongoing geopolitical uncertainty and central bank buying, creating a mixed environment.
watchFor: Fed signals clear dovish pivot (rate cuts)
Significant de-escalation of major geopolitical conflicts
Sharp appreciation of the US Dollar
